2605.21195.caption:
Figure 3:Overview of the RankE co-evolution framework.Stage 1 (Policy Alignment):The AR policy is updated via policy-gradient optimization to maximize a human-preference reward, with KL regularization toward an EMA reference policy.
The VQ decoder is frozen; this stage improves latent-space alignment but widens the mismatch with the decoder training distribution.Stage 2 (Decoder Adaptation):The policy is frozen and the VQ decoder is updated on policy-sampled latents via reward-weighted adversarial supervision (Rank-GAN), differentiable reward gradients, and EMA consistency regularization.
Alternating the two stages couples policy improvement with decoder adaptation, absorbing Latent Covariate Shift at each round.
2605.21195.caption_zh: 图 3：RankE 协同演化框架概览。第一阶段（策略对齐）：通过策略梯度优化更新 AR 策略，以最大化人类偏好奖励，并采用面向指数移动平均参考策略的 KL 正则化；此阶段 VQ 解码器被冻结。该阶段提升了潜在空间的对齐度，但也扩大了与解码器训练分布之间的失配。第二阶段（解码器适应）：策略被冻结，VQ 解码器基于策略采样的潜在表示，通过奖励加权的对抗性监督（Rank-GAN）、可微奖励梯度以及指数移动平均一致性正则化进行更新。交替进行这两个阶段可将策略改进与解码器适应相耦合，从而在每一轮中吸收潜在协变量偏移。

2605.21195.caption: Figure 2:Comparison of existing AR post-training and RankE framework.Left:After pre-training the VQ tokenizer, the existing works[10,62]only optimize the AR generator with the sampled latent rollouts by the RL ranking loss (policy gradients) with the T2I rewards while freezing the decoder, which will cause the Latent Covariate Shift between the generator and the decoder.Right:RankE applies an alternative training pipeline to co-evolve both the generator and the decoder by RL objectives with the T2I rewards (for the generator & decoder) and pixel rewards (for the decoder). By unlocking the decoder, this joint optimization directly mitigates this shift, ensuring that the latent representations remain firmly grounded in high-fidelity visual outputs.
2605.21195.caption_zh: 图 2：现有 AR 训练后优化方法与 RankE 框架的对比。左图：在预训练 VQ 分词器后，现有方法 [10,62] 仅通过 RL 排序损失（策略梯度）结合 T2I 奖励对 AR 生成器进行优化（使用采样的潜在序列展开），同时固定解码器，这将导致生成器与解码器之间的潜在协变量偏移。右图：RankE 采用交替训练流程，通过 RL 目标（结合 T2I 奖励（用于生成器和解码器）与像素奖励（用于解码器））协同优化生成器与解码器。通过解锁解码器，这种联合优化直接缓解了上述偏移，确保潜在表征始终稳固地基于高保真视觉输出。

2605.21195.caption: Figure 4:Evolution of generation metrics over training steps.Comparison of RankE against a Standard RL baseline with a frozen decoder. While Standard RL achieves marginal improvements in alignment, it suffers from stagnant or degrading visual fidelity (b) as the frozen decoder cannot adapt to policy-induced latent drift. In contrast, the co-evolution mechanism of RankE effectively translates reward optimization into pixel-space gains, simultaneously improving semantic alignment (a), image fidelity (b), and human preference scores (c).
2605.21195.caption_zh: 图4：生成指标随训练步数的演变。RankE 与使用冻结解码器的标准强化学习基线的对比。标准强化学习方法在对齐性方面仅获得边际提升，但由于冻结解码器无法适应策略引起的潜在漂移，其视觉保真度（b）陷入停滞或下降。相比之下，RankE 的协同演化机制有效地将奖励优化转化为像素空间的增益，同时提升语义对齐性（a）、图像保真度（b）和人类偏好得分（c）。

2605.23345.caption: Figure 2:SCOPEarchitecture. A SCOPE module is inserted into each DiT block. Discrete inputs use cross-attention with visual queries to confine effects to in-scope regions. Continuous inputs use MLP fusion and temporal self-attention for out-of-scope generation. Pathways combine via residual connections.
2605.23345.caption_zh: 图 2：SCOPE 架构。在每个 DiT 块中均插入一个 SCOPE 模块。离散输入采用交叉注意力机制与视觉查询相结合，以将作用范围限制在域内区域；连续输入则通过 MLP 融合与时间自注意力机制实现域外生成。各通路通过残差连接进行结合。

2605.23897.caption: Figure 3:Overview of ETCHR.(1) Reasoning Imitation SFTfine-tunes the base editor on curated question-edit trajectories, teaching it to infer the useful visual transformation from the question alone.(2) Reasoning Enhancement RLapplies GRPO with two VLM-derived rewards, edit correctness and downstream answer accuracy, to align the editor with reasoning utility rather than visual plausibility.(3) Edit-Verify-Reasoninference lets the understanding model verify each proposed edit and fall back to the original image when verification fails.
2605.23897.caption_zh: 图 3：ETCHR 方法概览。(1) 推理模仿 SFT：在精选的提问-编辑轨迹上对基础编辑器进行微调，使其仅通过问题即可推断出有效的视觉变换。(2) 推理增强 RL：采用 GRPO 并结合两种源自 VLM 的奖励——编辑正确性与下游答案准确性，以使编辑器与推理效用而非视觉合理性对齐。(3) 编辑-验证-推理推断：让理解模型对每个提出的编辑进行验证，并在验证失败时回退至原始图像。

2605.23897.caption: Figure 1:ETCHR vs. prior “think with images” paradigms.(a)Tool-basedmethods emit action tokens to a renderer, limiting edits to low-level operations and requiring VLM fine-tuning.(b)Unified modelsshare one backbone for text and images, weakening both and producing noisy intermediates.(c)ETCHR decouples a question-conditioned editor from the understanding MLLM and adds a verify-and-reason step, enabling plug-and-play use across tasks.(d)Across nine benchmarks, ETCHR (with Qwen3-VL-8B and Kimi K2.5 1T) surpasses tool-based and unified-model baselines.
2605.23897.caption_zh: 图 1：ETCHR 与先前“用图像思考”范式的对比。(a) 基于工具的方法向渲染器发送动作令牌，将编辑限制在低层操作，且需要视觉语言模型微调。(b) 统一模型共享文本和图像的单一主干，削弱了两者能力并产生噪声中间结果。(c) ETCHR 将问题条件编辑器与理解型多模态大模型解耦，并增加了验证-推理步骤，实现跨任务的即插即用。(d) 在九个基准测试中，ETCHR（使用 Qwen3-VL-8B 和 Kimi K2.5 1T）超越了基于工具和统一模型的基线。

2605.23897.caption: Figure 4:Qualitative comparisonof ETCHR with existing methods. ETCHR provides the most precise guidance for this problem, assisting the reasoning model in generating the correct answer.
2605.23897.caption_zh: 图4：ETCHR 与现有方法的定性对比。ETCHR 为该问题提供了最精确的引导，协助推理模型生成正确答案。

2605.23903.caption: Figure 2:Geo-Align pipeline.Given a conditioning video, we sample a camera trajectory from other camera-annotated data and scale it to a plausible range, with the scaling factor drawn from a truncated Gaussian distribution. After the model generates a set of rollout videos, a metric 3D evaluator assesses the camera trajectory of each sample to compute geometry rewards. Finally, the model is optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization[45].
2605.23903.caption_zh: 图 2：Geo-Align 流程。给定一个条件视频，我们从其他带有相机标注的数据中采样一条相机轨迹，并将其缩放至合理范围，缩放因子取自截断高斯分布。模型生成一组 rollout 视频后，由三维度量评估器对每个样本的相机轨迹进行评估，以计算几何奖励。最终，模型通过组相对策略优化[45]进行优化。

2605.23903.caption: Figure 1:Given a conditioning video, Geo-Align synthesizes a novel view video according to the target camera trajectory.
2605.23903.caption_zh: 图 1：在给定条件视频的情况下，Geo-Align 根据目标相机轨迹合成新视角视频。

2605.23903.caption: Figure 3:Qualitative results on the DAVIS[10]dataset.Geo-Align demonstrates superior capabilities in maintaining geometric consistency between the foreground subject and the background, whereas other methods suffer from varying degrees of distortion.
2605.23903.caption_zh: 图 3：在 DAVIS[10] 数据集上的定性结果。Geo-Align 方法在前景主体与背景之间保持几何一致性方面展现出更优的能力，而其他方法则存在不同程度的失真。

2605.23888.caption:
Figure 2:Pipeline overview.Given posed RGB images and a sparse point cloud from SfM (left), we define overlapping scene chunks and construct a global 3D conditioning grid by lifting DINOv3 image features into per-view volumes and aggregating them (center).
By extending a 3D generative prior with a new spatially-grounded multi-view conditioning pathway, we jointly generate all chunks in a single flow-matching trajectory to recover a complete, pose-aligned scene-level PBR mesh (right).
2605.23888.caption_zh: 图 2：流程总览。给定经过姿态标定的 RGB 图像以及来自运动恢复结构（SfM）的稀疏点云（左），我们定义重叠的场景区块，并通过将 DINOv3 图像特征提升为各视图体素并加以聚合，构建全局 3D 条件网格（中）。通过扩展一种 3D 生成先验模型，并引入新的空间锚定多视图条件通路，我们在单次流匹配轨迹中联合生成所有区块，以恢复完整、姿态对齐的场景级 PBR 网格（右）。

2605.23888.caption: Figure 1:GenRecon.Given a sparse set of RGB images of an indoor scene (left), our method reconstructs a complete, high-fidelity PBR mesh (center) by formulating scene reconstruction as conditional 3D generation over overlapping spatial chunks. The recovered mesh with material properties enables realistic relighting and editing in standard rendering pipelines (right).
2605.23888.caption_zh: 图 1：GenRecon 方法。给定一组室内场景的稀疏 RGB 图像（左），我们的方法通过将场景重建表述为重叠空间分块上的条件 3D 生成，重建出完整、高保真的 PBR 网格（中）。所恢复的带有材质属性的网格能够在标准渲染管线中实现逼真的重光照与编辑（右）。

2605.23888.caption_zh: 图 8：额外的重光照结果。展示基于 ScanNet++ 重建场景的不同光照配置。
